description: Raw JSON inputs for nested-structure canonicalization. Object key sort order (UCS-2 code-unit per RFC 8785) is the most common cross-implementation divergence point.

cases.name: reverse alphabetical
cases.rationale: keys sorted in UCS-2 code-unit order

cases.name: nested object
cases.rationale: recursive sort: inner keys also sorted

cases.name: array of objects
cases.rationale: each object in array sorted independently; array order preserved

cases.name: mixed types nested
cases.rationale: null, boolean, array values canonicalize correctly; keys sorted

cases.name: deeply nested
cases.rationale: arbitrary depth; guards against stack-based bugs
